label: The Basaltwind
description: The Basaltwind functions as a sea-sailing vessel adapted to Brineshade’s saline basins, its hull plated in dark, salt-scoured sheathing that resists mineral abrasion. A low, broad rig carries stiffened sails designed for the planet’s thin, mineral-laden air, with spars braced to endure abrupt tidal stresses driven by Saltharrow’s gravitic gradients. The deck fittings are deliberately minimal and sealed, favoring durable cleats, recessed hatches, and corrosion-tolerant hardware over ornament. Its profile reads as a compact, purposeful craft built for high-contrast navigation under the system’s hard white radiance and persistent haze bands.
